title: Vaping nicotine can harm healthy teen brain development: Poster - Canada.ca
content:
## Vaping nicotine can harm healthy teen brain development: Poster
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 169 KB, 1 page)
Organization: Health Canada
Published: 2019-03-14
VAPING NICOTINE CAN HARM HEALTHY TEEN BRAIN DEVELOPMENT
It can make it harder for you to concentrate, learn and manage your emotions.
Protect your brain. Leave the vape behind.
Canada.ca/vaping-info
